title: Jose's ULTIMATE NONSENSE pack
description: Turns almost every mob into characters from various media :D
body:
![logo](https://i.postimg.cc/85xtjG2w/logo-animation.gif)
REQUIRES EMF+ETF TO WOOOORK


This resource pack is a remake of my old "The complete nonsense pack" resource pack and turns almost EVERY mob in the game into a random character from movies, video games, tv shows and more!


You wanna have a 1v1 basketball match against an Enderman?
Wanna have an epic wizard showdown with the Ice King?
OOhhhhh you wanna get scammed for all your emeralds by Squidward?
OOOOrrrr maybe you wanna ride your own Yoshi?


Well, this pack's got you covered!



Who would win, Goku or 29,999,999,999 SpongeBobs?
Find it out yourself NOW!!! (Or- or maybe not... idk how strong your PC is)



Expect the unexpected, cuz this goofy pack
completely revamps Minecraft's wildlife, adding the funniest characters,
also changing the spawn egg textures!!!



Mobs that are currently not in the pack: Rabbit, Shulker, Magma cube, Tropical fish


That should be all! Thank you for checking out my project and I hope you like it :D


btw pls give me credit if you use this in any video/post or anything else, thank youuuuuu :)



![mcdonalds](https://i.postimg.cc/JhzLQ3GY/macdonald.png)



goofy ahh pack bro XD had a lot of fun making it, can't lie haha
